task.test_code:
# Test 1: Basic version comparison
assert compare_versions('1.0.0', '2.0.0') == -1, 'Major version comparison failed'
assert compare_versions('1.2.0', '1.1.0') == 1, 'Minor version comparison failed'
assert compare_versions('1.0.1', '1.0.0') == 1, 'Patch version comparison failed'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0', '1.0.0') == 0, 'Equal versions failed'

# Test 2: Pre-release is less than release
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-alpha', '1.0.0') == -1, 'Pre-release < release failed'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0', '1.0.0-alpha') == 1, 'Release > pre-release failed'

# Test 3: Pre-release ordering per spec
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-alpha', '1.0.0-alpha.1') == -1, 'alpha < alpha.1 failed'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-alpha.1', '1.0.0-alpha.beta') == -1, 'alpha.1 < alpha.beta failed'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-alpha.beta', '1.0.0-beta') == -1, 'alpha.beta < beta failed'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-beta', '1.0.0-beta.2') == -1, 'beta < beta.2 failed'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-beta.2', '1.0.0-beta.11') == -1, 'beta.2 < beta.11 failed (numeric compare)'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-beta.11', '1.0.0-rc.1') == -1, 'beta.11 < rc.1 failed'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-rc.1', '1.0.0') == -1, 'rc.1 < release failed'

# Test 4: Numeric identifiers compared as integers
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-1', '1.0.0-2') == -1, 'Numeric pre-release 1 < 2 failed'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-2', '1.0.0-10') == -1, 'Numeric 2 < 10 failed (must not be lexical)'

# Test 5: Numeric < string identifiers
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-1', '1.0.0-alpha') == -1, 'Numeric < string failed'

# Test 6: Build metadata should be IGNORED
assert compare_versions('1.0.0+build1', '1.0.0+build2') == 0, 'Build metadata should be ignored'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0+build', '1.0.0') == 0, 'Build metadata vs no metadata should be equal'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-alpha+build', '1.0.0-alpha') == 0, 'Pre-release with build metadata failed'

# Test 7: Leading 'v' prefix (common in real-world)
assert compare_versions('v1.0.0', 'v2.0.0') == -1, 'v-prefix comparison failed'
assert compare_versions('v1.0.0', '1.0.0') == 0, 'v-prefix vs no prefix should be equal'

# Test 8: Equal pre-release versions
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-alpha.1', '1.0.0-alpha.1') == 0, 'Equal pre-release failed'

# Test 9: Pre-release with build metadata
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-alpha+001', '1.0.0-alpha+002') == 0, 'Pre-release build metadata not ignored'

# Test 10: Longer pre-release identifiers
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-alpha', '1.0.0-alpha.0') == -1, 'Shorter pre-release < longer failed'
assert compare_versions('1.0.0-alpha.0.0', '1.0.0-alpha.0') == 1, 'Longer > shorter pre-release failed'

# Test 11: Two-digit version numbers
assert compare_versions('10.20.30', '10.20.30') == 0, 'Multi-digit equal failed'
assert compare_versions('10.20.30', '10.20.31') == -1, 'Multi-digit patch failed'

print('All compare_versions tests passed!')
